perturbation.original_text: Not to supply any documents or portions of documents incl uded in the Information or any information included therein or any information hereinafter obtained in the course hereof or with respect hereto to any person or corporation except to the Representatives (defined bel ow) and as otherwise specifically provided for herein;
perturbation.changed_text: Not to supply any documents or portions of documents included in the Information to any person or corporation without prior written consent.
perturbation.explanation: The original clause specifies that the Information can be shared with 'Representatives' as defined in the NDA. The changed text removes the exception for 'Representatives,' now requiring 'prior written consent' for *any* disclosure, contradicting the clause defining who the information can be shared with, thus hindering diligence required for possible acquisition. It also introduces uncertainty about whether Representatives are still allowed access, creating an internal contradiction.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The Information is to be used by the undersigned, its affiliates, and their respective directors, officers, employees, accountants, attorneys, solicitors, financing sources, consultants, agents, repres entatives and advisors and their respective representatives, to the extent the foregoing ar e actually provided access to t he Information by the undersigned (collectively the “ Representatives ”), only in connection with the consideration of a possible acquisition of the Assets;
perturbation.justification: The original text allows the sharing of information with 'Representatives' and as otherwise provided in the agreement. The changed text removes the exception for Representatives and requires prior written consent for any disclosure. The contradicted text explicitly defines 'Representatives' and states they are permitted access to the information. The changed text directly contradicts this by requiring prior written consent even for Representatives, creating a strong in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: To advise the Representatives of the confidential nature of the Information, and to provide to those Representatives to which or to whom the Information is provided a Confidentiality and Non -Disclosure Agreement Baldwin Paper Co. Limited /Papiers Baldwin Compagine Limitee and 9169- 2707 Quebec Inc. o/a Papiers Baldwin – February 2012 2 of 4 copy of the NDA, and if such Representative is not otherwise bound by restrictions on disclosure and use similar to the obligations hereunder, to have such Representatives agree to be bound by this NDA ;
perturbation.changed_text: To inform individuals who access the Information of its sensitivity.
perturbation.explanation: The original text clearly mandates providing Representatives with a copy of the NDA and ensuring they are bound by similar confidentiality obligations. The changed text weakens this requirement to simply 'informing individuals of its sensitivity,' removing the legally binding aspect and contradiction Clause 5 about responsibility.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The undersigned shall be responsible for any breach of the provisions of this NDA by any of the Representatives to whom the undersigned discloses Information;
perturbation.justification: The original text placed a strict obligation on ensuring representatives were bound by confidentiality via an NDA. The changed text significantly weakens this to simply informing individuals of the information's sensitivity. This directly contradicts the 'Contradicted Text' which states the undersigned is responsible for any breach by representatives. The weakened obligation in the changed text removes the legal binding aspect which would make the undersigned potentially unable to enforce confidentiality and therefore liable for breaches they cannot control. This aligns with the 'Omissions' definition where essential language is removed creating a contradiction with obligations stated in other sections.

perturbation.original_text: In the event that the undersigned, or any of the Representatives, or any one to whom any of them furnish some or all of the Information, receives a request or demand to disclose all or any part of such Information by a governmental body or deposition, interrogatory, request for documents, subpoena, civil investigative demand or similar process, the undersigned agrees to first notify BDO (to the extent permitted to do so by applicable law) by delivering written notice to the address noted above, so that BDO or its legal representative may seek an appropriate protective order; provided, however, if such protective order or other remedy is not obtained, or BDO waive s compliance with the provisions hereof, the undersigned or such Representative, as the case may be, may disclose such Information which the undersigned or such Representative, as the case may be, is legally required to be disclosed;
perturbation.changed_text: In the event of a request to disclose Information, the receiving party will consult with legal counsel.
perturbation.explanation: The original clause outlines a specific process for handling requests to disclose information by a governmental body, including notifying BDO and allowing them to seek a protective order. The modified text removes the notification requirement to BDO, only stating the receiving party will consult legal counsel, thus removing BDO's ability to protect its confidential information and creating a contradiction to overall confidentiality obligations.
perturbation.contradicted_text: To maintain the Information in accordance with internal dissemination policies.
perturbation.justification: The original text outlines a specific procedure for disclosing information, including notifying BDO. The changed text removes the notification requirement, contradicting the contradicted text 'To maintain the Information in accordance with internal dissemination policies.' BDO can no longer enforce its internal dissemination policies since it won't be notified of requests to disclose information.

perturbation.original_text: The undersigned acknowledges and agrees that the execution and delivery of this NDA and the delivery of the Information does not give rise to any legal obligation of BDO or Baldwin, whether in contract, in negligence or other tort, by way of fiduciary duty or otherwise. Without limiting the generality of the foregoing, the undersigned acknowledges and agrees that BDO is not and will not be under any obligation, express or implied, to provide or to continue to provide Information, to entertain any offers or proposals for the purchase or transfer of the Assets, or to complete a sale or other Confidentiality and Non -Disclosure Agreement Baldwin Paper Co. Limited /Papiers Baldwin Compagine Limitee and 9169- 2707 Quebec Inc. o/a Papiers Baldwin – February 2012 3 of 4 transaction with the undersigned, unless and until Baldwin and the undersigned execute and deliver a legally binding agreement expressly providing for such obligations . Without limiting the foregoing, the undersigned acknowledges and agrees that neither Baldwin nor BDO has made , and they will not make , any representations or warranties, either express or implied, concerning the accuracy or completeness of, or otherwise relating in any way to, the Information . BDO and Baldwin shall not have any liability whatsoever to the undersigned or any Representatives for any transaction entered into, or not entered into, or any other ac t, omission or decision made or taken, relying upon or in any way affected by, the Information . The foregoing shall nonetheless be subject to any representations and warranties concerning the Information expressly given in writing in a legally binding agreement executed and delivered by Baldwin providing for a sale or other disposition of the Assets (a “Definitive Agreement ”);
perturbation.changed_text: BDO and Baldwin are not obligated to provide any further information.
perturbation.explanation: The original text is a comprehensive disclaimer of any obligation on BDO or Baldwin's part to provide information or complete a transaction, unless a 'Definitive Agreement' is in place. The modified text drastically shortens this, stating only that BDO and Baldwin are not obligated to provide *further* information. This implies an obligation to have already provided some information, which contradicts the more comprehensive disclaimer and creates ambiguity about their liability.
perturbation.contradicted_text: To inform individuals who access the Information of its sensitivity.
perturbation.justification: The original text comprehensively disclaims any obligation to provide information unless a 'Definitive Agreement' is in place. The changed text implies an obligation to have provided some information by stating BDO and Baldwin are not obligated to provide *further* information. This contradicts the contradicted text which states 'To inform individuals who access the Information of its sensitivity', because the 'changed text' implies that information was shared while the original text disclaims any obligation to provide any information and the contradicted text assumes information was provided. This creates a strong contradiction because the modified text introduces an implication of a pre-existing obligation to provide information, which directly conflicts with the original disclaimer and introduces uncertainty where there should be none, thus aligning with the definition of 'Omissions – In Text Contradiction'.

perturbation.original_text: The terms of this NDA shall expire , as it relates only to the Information associated with the Assets or parts thereof purchased or otherwise acquired by the undersigned, upon the completion of a Definitive Agreement . In all other cases, the terms of this NDA shall expire one (1) year after the completion of a sale or other transfer of the Assets.
perturbation.changed_text: This NDA shall remain in effect indefinitely.
perturbation.explanation: The original text states the NDA expires either upon completion of a Definitive Agreement or one year after the asset sale. The changed text states the NDA remains in effect 'indefinitely.' This creates a direct contradiction about the duration of the agreement's confidentiality obligations. This has impacts in terms of legal enforcement, and is contradictory with term limits in NDA agreements.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Upon receipt of a written request to the undersigned, the undersigned and its Representatives shall promptly return to BDO any and all Information received, printed, downloaded or otherwise copied together with personal notes including written materials an d any notes of verbal conversations with representatives from Baldwin or BDO obtained in the course of any investigation and/or inspection of the business and the Assets being offered for sale;
perturbation.justification: The original text specified an expiration for the NDA, either upon completion of a Definitive Agreement or one year after the asset sale. The changed text states the NDA remains in effect 'indefinitely.' This directly contradicts the original expiration terms. The contradicted text discusses returning information, implying a potential end to the NDA's obligations. The change to an indefinite term creates a direct contradiction with the idea that the information needs to be returned, because the NDA may extend beyond any practical need for it, leading to enforceability issues.
